MX Master 3S - Performance Wireless Mouse | Logitech
Track on glass. 8K DPI any-surface tracking. Quiet Clicks. MagSpeed scroll wheel. USB-C quick charging. Connect up to 3 devices.

The Logitech MX Master 3S is an excellent wireless mouse for office use. It has a comfortable, ergonomic design with a thumb rest.

Sensor: Darkfield high precision. DPI range: 200-8000. Number of buttons: 7. Scroll wheel: MagSpeed Electromagnetic.

Logitech MX Master 3S - Wireless Performance Mouse - Amazon.com
8K DPI track-on-glass sensor. Quiet clicks. USB-C rechargeable. Compatible with macOS, Windows, Linux, iPadOS, Android, ChromeOS.

Logitech MX Master 3S review | TechRadar
The Logitech MX Master 3S is an iterative upgrade over the MX Master 3 with 8K DPI sensor and quiet mechanical switches.

The Logitech MX Master 3S is a refined version of our long-standing Editors' Choice pick for wireless mice.
